prompt.content:
Please upload the organisation hierarchy, along with cost centers, movements, and locations, to Workday using the attached data. 

Once complete, add the recommended hire for the COO position to the organisation, using the same CC, org, and profile ID as WRK-002. The worker ID for the recommended hire would be WRK-201, and the hire date would be 26 Jan 2026. Please provide the number of workers in CC-01 as of 5th Aug 2023, 5th Aug 2024, 5th Aug 2025, and 30th Jan 2026.

Please provide all your answers directly in the console. Use the username hr_admin and the password hr_admin for access.
